textByHashes.1f03e37c7be5c46239f279d6fc8490ed05c578fa: Why, yes I am. Why do you ask?
textByHashes.4daccbc055384395df182a6d241fa018e7005f4e: No, I'm afraid I don't know anything about that.
textByHashes.f319ac0ab0dd92d7713ebab9a0e7a18e8cf28e77: You don't have a sapling planted in that patch. Plant one and I might agree to look after it for you.
textByHashes.afa4c7dd799e237ef8992f1ef147eb9959379c1e: That patch is already fully grown! I don't know what you want me to do with it!
textByHashes.1fc91822a6dd38a1807d1ec0d6aa54c61e2e9529: That depends on whether I have it to sell. What is it that you're looking for?
textByHashes.83a1001cf1f9a1f51953dfbdb6de8fe0b7d63660: I'm too busy with my crops to work on this! Please solve it for me.
textByHashes.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
